topic: clay soil particle size and water retention
trigger_keywords: suelo ofrece mayor retención de agua

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A soil contains a high proportion of very small clay particles.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The small particles create many fine pores and a large surface area that hold water by capillary and adsorptive forces.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Clay soil generally drains more slowly and retains more water than a coarse sandy soil.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Fine clay particles and small pores give clay soils high water-retention capacity.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
